chunks.title: Land Distribution and Boundaries
chunks.reason: Describes the specific measurements and allocation of land for the sanctuary, priests, Levites, city, and prince.

chunks.title: Exhortation to Princes and People
chunks.reason: Contains a direct address to the princes regarding justice and details the specific contributions required from the people and the prince.

chunks.title: Sanctuary Purification and Feast Offerings
chunks.reason: Outlines the ritual for purifying the sanctuary in the first month and the specific sacrificial offerings required during the Passover and the feast in the seventh month.
